001import java.awt.BorderLayout;
002import java.awt.Dimension;
003import java.awt.GridLayout;
004import java.awt.event.ActionEvent;
005import java.awt.event.ActionListener;
006import java.awt.event.WindowAdapter;
007import java.awt.event.WindowEvent;
008import java.net.URL;
009import javax.swing.ImageIcon;
010import javax.swing.JButton;
011import javax.swing.JFrame;
012import javax.swing.JLabel;
013import javax.swing.JPanel;
014import javax.swing.JScrollPane;
015import javax.swing.JTextArea;
016import javax.swing.JTextField;
017
018/**
019 * Swing-based graphical shell for the text adventure: log area, text field,
020 * directional shortcut buttons, and an optional room image.
021 * <p>
022 * Implements {@link ActionListener} so both the entry field and buttons forward
023 * normalized commands to the {@link GameEngine}.
024 * </p>
025 *
026 * @author Michael Kolling
027 * @version 1.0 (Jan 2003) DB edited (2023)
028 */
029public class UserInterface implements ActionListener
030{
031    /** Game logic invoked when the user submits a command. */
032    private GameEngine aEngine;
033    /** Top-level window hosting all components. */
034    private JFrame     aMyFrame;
035    /** Single-line input where the player types commands. */
036    private JTextField aEntryField;
037    /** Scrollable transcript of game output. */
038    private JTextArea  aLog;
039    /** Displays the current room image when available. */
040    private JLabel     aImage;
041    /** Displays a map image (if provided by the engine). */
042    private JLabel     aMap;
043    /** Sends {@code go north} when clicked. */
044    private JButton    aButtonGoNorth;
045    /** Sends {@code go south} when clicked. */
046    private JButton    aButtonGoSouth;
047    /** Sends {@code go east} when clicked. */
048    private JButton    aButtonGoEast;
049    /** Sends {@code go west} when clicked. */
050    private JButton    aButtonGoWest;
051    /** Sends {@code go up} when clicked. */
052    private JButton    aButtonGoUp;
053    /** Sends {@code go down} when clicked. */
054    private JButton    aButtonGoDown;
055    /** Sends {@code help} when clicked. */
056    private JButton    aButtonHelp;
057    /** Sends {@code back} when clicked. */
058    private JButton    aButtonBack;
059    /** Sends {@code quit} when clicked. */
060    private JButton    aButtonQuit;
061
062    /**
063     * Builds the frame, layout, and listeners, storing the engine for later callbacks.
064     *
065     * @param pGameEngine the non-{@code null} game engine that will interpret commands
066     */
067    public UserInterface( final GameEngine pGameEngine )
068    {
069        this.aEngine = pGameEngine;
070        this.createGUI();
071    } // UserInterface(.)
072
073    /**
074     * Appends text to the log without a trailing newline and scrolls to the end.
075     *
076     * @param pText fragment to append (may be empty)
077     */
078    public void print( final String pText )
079    {
080        this.aLog.append( pText );
081        this.aLog.setCaretPosition( this.aLog.getDocument().getLength() );
082    } // print(.)
083
084    /**
085     * Appends a line of text to the log, then scrolls to the end.
086     *
087     * @param pText full line content (a newline is added automatically)
088     */
089    public void println( final String pText )
090    {
091        this.print( pText + "\n" );
092    } // println(.)
093
094    /**
095     * Loads an image from the classpath (typically under {@code images/}) and sets
096     * it on the north label, packing the frame to fit.
097     *
098     * @param pImageName resource path relative to the class loader root
099     */
100    public void showImage( final String pImageName )
101    {
102        String vImagePath = "" + pImageName;
103        URL vImageURL = this.getClass().getClassLoader().getResource( vImagePath );
104        if ( vImageURL == null ) {
105            System.out.println( "Image not found: " + vImagePath );
106        }
107        else {
108            ImageIcon vIcon = new ImageIcon( vImageURL );
109            this.aImage.setIcon( vIcon );
110        }
111    } // showImage(.)
112
113    /**
114     * Loads an image from the classpath (typically under {@code images/}) and sets
115     * it on the map label.
116     *
117     * @param pImageName resource path relative to the class loader root
118     */
119    public void showMap( final String pImageName )
120    {
121        String vImagePath = "" + pImageName;
122        URL vImageURL = this.getClass().getClassLoader().getResource( vImagePath );
123        if ( vImageURL == null ) {
124            System.out.println( "Image not found: " + vImagePath );
125        }
126        else {
127            ImageIcon vIcon = new ImageIcon( vImageURL );
128            this.aMap.setIcon( vIcon );
129        }
130    } // showMap(.)
131    
132    /**
133     * Enables or disables keyboard entry in the command field and toggles caret blink.
134     *
135     * @param pOnOff {@code true} to allow typing; {@code false} to freeze input at game end
136     */
137    public void enable( final boolean pOnOff )
138    {
139        this.aEntryField.setEditable( pOnOff );
140        if ( pOnOff ) {
141            this.aEntryField.getCaret().setBlinkRate( 500 );
142            this.aEntryField.addActionListener( this );
143        }
144        else {
145            this.aEntryField.getCaret().setBlinkRate( 0 );
146            this.aEntryField.removeActionListener( this );
147        }
148    } // enable(.)
149
150    /**
151     * Lays out components, registers listeners, and shows the window.
152     */
153    private void createGUI()
154    {
155        this.aMyFrame = new JFrame( "Pokémon Delta Emerald" );
156        this.aEntryField = new JTextField( 34 );
157
158        this.aLog = new JTextArea();
159        this.aLog.setEditable( false );
160        JScrollPane vListScroller = new JScrollPane( this.aLog );
161        vListScroller.setPreferredSize( new Dimension( 200, 200 ) );
162        vListScroller.setMinimumSize( new Dimension( 100, 100 ) );
163
164        this.aImage = new JLabel();
165        this.aImage.setHorizontalAlignment( JLabel.CENTER );
166        this.aImage.setVerticalAlignment( JLabel.CENTER );
167        
168        this.aMap = new JLabel();
169
170        this.aButtonGoUp = new JButton( "go up" );
171        this.aButtonGoNorth = new JButton( "go north" );
172        this.aButtonGoDown = new JButton( "go down" );
173        this.aButtonGoWest = new JButton( "go west" );
174        this.aButtonGoEast = new JButton( "go east" );
175        this.aButtonBack = new JButton( "go back" );
176        this.aButtonHelp = new JButton( "help" );
177        this.aButtonGoSouth = new JButton( "go south" );
178        this.aButtonQuit = new JButton( "quit" );
179
180        JPanel vButtonPanel = new JPanel();
181        vButtonPanel.setLayout( new GridLayout( 3, 3 ) );
182        vButtonPanel.add( this.aButtonGoUp );
183        vButtonPanel.add( this.aButtonGoNorth );
184        vButtonPanel.add( this.aButtonGoDown );
185        vButtonPanel.add( this.aButtonGoWest );
186        vButtonPanel.add( this.aButtonBack );
187        vButtonPanel.add( this.aButtonGoEast );
188        vButtonPanel.add( this.aButtonHelp );
189        vButtonPanel.add( this.aButtonGoSouth );
190        vButtonPanel.add( this.aButtonQuit );
191
192        JPanel vPanel = new JPanel();
193        vPanel.setLayout( new BorderLayout() );
194        vPanel.add( this.aImage, BorderLayout.CENTER );
195
196        JPanel vSouthPanel = new JPanel();
197        vSouthPanel.setLayout( new BorderLayout() );
198        vSouthPanel.setPreferredSize( new Dimension( 0, 400 ) );
199        
200        vSouthPanel.add( vListScroller, BorderLayout.CENTER );
201        vSouthPanel.add( this.aEntryField, BorderLayout.SOUTH );
202        vSouthPanel.add( vButtonPanel, BorderLayout.WEST );
203        vSouthPanel.add( this.aMap, BorderLayout.EAST );
204        
205        vPanel.add( vSouthPanel, BorderLayout.SOUTH );
206
207        this.aMyFrame.getContentPane().add( vPanel, BorderLayout.CENTER );
208
209        this.aEntryField.addActionListener( this );
210        this.aButtonGoNorth.addActionListener( this );
211        this.aButtonGoSouth.addActionListener( this );
212        this.aButtonGoEast.addActionListener( this );
213        this.aButtonGoWest.addActionListener( this );
214        this.aButtonGoUp.addActionListener( this );
215        this.aButtonGoDown.addActionListener( this );
216        this.aButtonBack.addActionListener( this );
217        this.aButtonQuit.addActionListener( this );
218        this.aButtonHelp.addActionListener( this );
219
220        this.aMyFrame.addWindowListener(
221            new WindowAdapter() {
222                @Override public void windowClosing( final WindowEvent pE )
223                {
224                    System.exit( 0 );
225                }
226            } );
227            
228        this.aMyFrame.setVisible( true );
229        this.aEntryField.requestFocus();
230        this.aMyFrame.setExtendedState( JFrame.MAXIMIZED_BOTH );
231    } // createGUI()
232
233    /**
234     * Dispatches button clicks as canned commands, or reads the text field on Enter.
235     *
236     * @param pE the originating AWT event (button or text field)
237     */
238    @Override public void actionPerformed( final ActionEvent pE )
239    {
240        if ( this.aButtonGoNorth.equals( pE.getSource() ) ) {
241            this.aEngine.interpretCommand( "go north" );
242        }
243        else if ( this.aButtonGoSouth.equals( pE.getSource() ) ) {
244            this.aEngine.interpretCommand( "go south" );
245        }
246        else if ( this.aButtonGoEast.equals( pE.getSource() ) ) {
247            this.aEngine.interpretCommand( "go east" );
248        }
249        else if ( this.aButtonGoWest.equals( pE.getSource() ) ) {
250            this.aEngine.interpretCommand( "go west" );
251        }
252        else if ( this.aButtonGoUp.equals( pE.getSource() ) ) {
253            this.aEngine.interpretCommand( "go up" );
254        }
255        else if ( this.aButtonGoDown.equals( pE.getSource() ) ) {
256            this.aEngine.interpretCommand( "go down" );
257        }
258        else if ( this.aButtonBack.equals( pE.getSource() ) ) {
259            this.aEngine.interpretCommand( "back" );
260        }
261        else if ( this.aButtonQuit.equals( pE.getSource() ) ) {
262            this.aEngine.interpretCommand( "quit" );
263        }
264        else if ( this.aButtonHelp.equals( pE.getSource() ) ) {
265            this.aEngine.interpretCommand( "help" );
266        }
267        else {
268            this.processCommand();
269        }
270    } // actionPerformed(.)
271
272    /**
273     * Reads the entry field, clears it, and forwards the trimmed line to the engine.
274     */
275    private void processCommand()
276    {
277        String vInput = this.aEntryField.getText();
278        this.aEntryField.setText( "" );
279
280        this.aEngine.interpretCommand( vInput );
281    } // processCommand()
282} // UserInterface
